intended_use: ClearPoint Maestro™ Brain Model is intended for automatic labeling, visualization, volumetric and shape quantification of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. This software is intende
intended_use_full: ClearPoint Maestro™ Brain Model is intended for automatic labeling, visualization, volumetric and shape quantification of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. This software is intended to automate the process of identifying, labelling, and quantifying the volume and shape of brain structures visible in MRI images.
other_metrics: Dice coefficient >70% for 21 segmented brain structures (101 subjects); relative volume difference <0.3; reproducibility with absolute volume differences <10% for repeated scans
